title: academy-messages/v1
description: The lock screen's SYSTEM BROADCAST feed. Serves public/messages.json (the committed baseline) and the KV values overlaid on it by functions/messages.json.ts.

message.$comment: Every field is required. There is no message worth broadcasting that lacks any one of them, and an omitted field only ever means the author forgot.

id.description: Stable and unique. Reuse a baseline id from KV to shadow that entry.

level.description: Drives the dot and tag colour: update=cyan, info=gray, alert=amber, resolved=green. `alert` also PINS the message to the top of the panel, above every other level, regardless of date. `resolved` does not pin — it falls back to date order, so a resolved incident ages out naturally.

date.description: REQUIRED. `YYYY-MM-DD`, or a full ISO 8601 datetime when the writer has one (a health check does). ISO strings compare lexicographically in chronological order, so a timestamp orders correctly against a bare date on the same day. Only the first 10 characters are rendered.
